description: non-zero beat with no trigger word — beatHasLocationChange returns false, so setting suppressed; full mode

input.previousBeatProse: The rumor spread through the room in fits. A cup overturned on the table. Smoke curled from a snuffed candle.

scenes.description: Bruenor calls the elders to the long table.
He lays out the threat in plain terms.
He listens to the dwarves argue back and forth without yielding ground.

characters.name: Bruenor
characters.speechPattern: blunt, gruff, peppered with dwarven oaths

locations.name: Mithril Hall
locations.description: Ancestral dwarven stronghold beneath the mountain.
locations.sensoryDetails: forge-warm air, the deep hum of stone, the tang of iron
